---
title: 'Practice Session'
date: '2015-07-29T12:58:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3971096091137875794'
blogger_filename: '/2015/07/practice-session_29.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Writing Practice'
---

I hate green grass. It always needs to be mowed. With it comes the sneezing and itching. Then with the green comes heat, enemy number 2.<br /><br /><br /><br />Why can't it be fall and winter all the time, all year round?<br /><br /><br /><br />The thoughts swirled in his head like clouds, as he was trying to think of something to write during his practice session.<br /><br /><br /><br />So he wrote this... then he got up, made food, and went to work. Sweater Weather can't come soon enough!
